description: You are the fleet supervisor at Riverside Municipal Waste Services. The department operates overnight refuse collection starting at 2:00 AM to avoid daytime traffic. Configure the Sygic GPS Navigation app for a driver operating a heavy refuse collection truck. Set the display to dark colors for night driving safety. Configure the routing to avoid highways and expressways due to weight restrictions and optimize for minimum distance. Create a vehicle profile named 'Refuse Truck' (Diesel, 2018, Euro 6 standard) and set the temperature units to Fahrenheit for maintenance logs. The app is open on the main map screen.
